ability.name: かげふみ
ability.effect: あいての かげを ふみにげたり こうたい できなくする。
ability.effect_en: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out, unless they are holding a Shed Shell, are a Ghost type, or also have this Ability.

ability.name: テクニシャン
ability.effect: いりょくが ひくい わざのいりょくを たかくして こうげきできる。
ability.effect_en: This Pokemon's moves of 60 power or less have their power multiplied by 1.5, including Struggle. This effect comes after a move's effect changes its own power.
